subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto those who are in the heavens and on earth, that they may turn unto God, the Lord of Return. Verily, those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لمن فی السموات و الارض لیتوجهن الی الله مالک الماب ان الذین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
